skill.name: weekly-report-generator
skill.description: 周报/月报自动生成 — 输入工作日志→结构化周报+数据图表+下月计划
skill.summary: 周报/月报自动生成 — 输入工作日志→结构化周报+数据图表+下月计划
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged two high-severity patterns: weak cryptographic algorithm on line 4 and high file entropy (6.21 bits) on line 1. Both are false positives triggered by UTF-8 encoded Chinese text which confuses ASCII-oriented pattern heuristics. Line 4 contains only a Chinese business description with no cryptographic code. The entropy level is normal for multilingual text, not encrypted content. This single-file markdown skill has no executable code, network calls, or data handling. Verified safe to publish.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Detection
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged line 4 as containing a weak cryptographic algorithm. Line 4 is a Chinese business description with no code: the Chinese characters triggered pattern-based heuristics designed for ASCII source code. No cryptographic, hashing, or security-related code exists anywhere in this file.

low_findings.title: False Positive: High File Entropy Detection
low_findings.description: Static analyzer reported entropy of 6.21 bits at line 1, flagging possible encrypted or binary content. This entropy level is normal and expected for UTF-8 encoded Chinese text, which naturally has higher byte-level entropy than ASCII. True encrypted content typically exceeds 7.5 bits. The file is plain text markdown with standard YAML frontmatter.

content.user_title: Generate Polished Weekly Reports from Work Notes
content.value_statement: Writing weekly status reports from scattered work notes takes hours of tedious formatting. This skill transforms your raw work logs into structured reports with data summaries and next-period action plans in minutes.
actual_capabilities: Transform raw work logs into structured weekly or monthly reports
Generate data summaries and trend descriptions from provided metrics
Draft next-period action plans based on current work progress
Format output with professional headers, sections, and organized bullet points
Support both Chinese and English report generation based on input language
Handle multiple input formats including free-form notes, bullet points, and structured logs
limitations: Cannot access live data sources or company databases for information
Requires user-provided work logs as input material to generate reports
Generated data visualizations are text descriptions, not actual image files
Output quality depends on the level of detail and accuracy of input data

use_cases.title: Individual Contributor Weekly Reporting
use_cases.description: A software engineer compiles daily commits, ticket resolutions, and meeting notes into a structured weekly status report for their engineering manager.

use_cases.title: Team Lead Monthly Review
use_cases.description: A team lead aggregates individual team member updates into a department-wide monthly review with progress summaries and upcoming priorities.

use_cases.title: Freelancer Client Updates
use_cases.description: A freelancer converts project activity logs into polished client update emails with completed milestones, current status, and planned next steps.

prompt_templates.title: Quick Weekly Summary
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a concise weekly report from these work notes. Include completed tasks, current priorities, and any blockers: [paste your work notes here]
prompt_templates.scenario: Fast end-of-week summary from simple daily notes

prompt_templates.title: Structured Report with Metrics
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a structured weekly report with these sections: Completed Tasks, Key Metrics, Blocker Items, Meetings Attended, and Next Week Plan. Here are my notes: [paste structured or free-form notes]
prompt_templates.scenario: Formal team report with quantifiable data points

prompt_templates.title: Monthly Report with Trend Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a monthly report from these weekly summaries. Include trend analysis across the month, key achievements, metric comparisons to previous month, and strategic recommendations for next month: [paste monthly data or weekly summaries]
prompt_templates.scenario: Executive monthly review with longitudinal analysis

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Source Comprehensive Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Synthesize this collection of meeting notes, commit logs, project tickets, and team updates into a comprehensive cross-team monthly report. Include executive summary, department KPIs, risk assessment, resource allocation notes, and forward-looking recommendations: [paste all aggregated sources]
prompt_templates.scenario: Cross-functional executive report from multiple data streams

output_examples.input: Monday: fixed login timeout bug, attended sprint planning. Tuesday: implemented payment API validation, code review for team. Wednesday: database migration testing, client requirements meeting. Thursday: wrote integration tests, deployed hotfix. Friday: documentation updates, sprint retrospective.
output_examples.output:
## Weekly Report

### Completed Tasks
- Fixed login timeout bug affecting mobile users
- Implemented payment API validation with error handling
- Completed database migration testing for v2.1 schema
- Deployed hotfix for checkout flow edge case
- Wrote 24 integration tests for payment module

### Meetings
- Sprint planning session
- Client requirements review
- Sprint retrospective

### Next Week Priorities
- Begin payment API staging deployment
- User profile page redesign kickoff
- Performance audit for database queries

output_examples.input: This month: launched mobile app v2.0, 15 percent user growth, 3 major client onboardings, 2 production incidents resolved within SLA, shipped 8 new features.
output_examples.output:
## Monthly Summary

### Key Achievements
- Mobile app v2.0 launched on schedule with no critical issues
- User base grew by 15 percent (2,400 new active users)
- Onboarded 3 enterprise clients with custom integrations

### Metrics at a Glance
- System uptime: 99.7 percent
- Production incidents: 2 (both resolved within 2-hour SLA)
- New features shipped: 8
- Customer satisfaction score: 4.6 out of 5

### Next Month Focus
- App performance optimization initiative
- Client success program launch
- Engineering hiring pipeline

best_practices: Provide work logs with dates, context, and outcomes for richer and more accurate reports
Review and adjust AI-generated reports before sharing with managers or stakeholders
Include both quantitative metrics and qualitative context in your input for balanced output
anti_patterns: Do not paste sensitive company data, credentials, or personal information into the prompt
Avoid sharing unedited AI-generated output directly with external stakeholders without review
Do not rely on the skill to invent data for time periods where you have no actual work logs

faq.question: What input format does this skill accept?
faq.answer: It accepts free-form work notes, bullet points, structured logs, or pasted meeting notes. More detail in your input produces more comprehensive reports.

faq.question: Can it generate actual charts and graphs?
faq.answer: It generates text-based data summaries and chart descriptions within the report. It does not produce actual image files or visual chart renderings.

faq.question: Does it support languages other than Chinese?
faq.answer: Yes. It generates reports in Chinese, English, and other major languages. The output language matches the language of your input.

faq.question: Can I customize the report format and sections?
faq.answer: You can specify preferred sections, headers, formatting styles, and tone in your prompt. The skill adapts its output to your requested structure.

faq.question: Is my work data secure when using this skill?
faq.answer: The skill runs within your Claude session and does not transmit data to external servers. Your work logs remain in your conversation context.

faq.question: How is this different from asking Claude directly for a report?
faq.answer: This skill includes optimized report templates and formatting rules that produce more consistent, professionally structured output than a generic one-time request.
